name: MiniCPM-2B
license: Custom (OpenBMB General Model License; free for research, free commercial use after registration)
archDisplay: Decoder-only Transformer, deep-and-thin design (40 layers, 2304 hidden dim, Mistral-derived tokenizer)
note: Pioneering ~2.4B-non-embedding edge LLM matching Mistral-7B on many benchmarks; runs on-device including smartphones
